title: Aquaculture Delight
description: Adds Farmer's Delight and Aquaculture compatibility. Vanilla style.
body:
![Aquaculture Delight mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/U9GJqWrI/images/3f34bd0dda847c761ee3d40322c98e09eff95f92.png)
Available on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture-delight) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquaculture-delight)

### 📖 About

Aquaculture Delight is an add-on for [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) that adds compatibility with [Aquaculture 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture). Lightweight and compatible with most other food mods via common tags by default.

![Farmer's Structures compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/U9GJqWrI/images/b932d09b111c6453fa18631cd6b996686cf73c2b.png)
Compatible with [Farmer's Structures](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-structures)

### 🐟 Main Features
- Use Aquaculture fish to make new dishes wtih useful effects. Placeable food included.
- Neptunium Knife, the little brother of the similar fillet knife. FarmersDelight-ish stats.
- Mutual compatibility of Farmers' and Aquaculture knives for all purposes.
- Additional helpful recipes for cooking pot and cutting board.
- And much more! - Detailed description available [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture-delight).


### 💬 Permissions

✔️ You are allowed to include this mod in [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture-delight) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquaculture-delight) modpacks. Also feel free to use this mod in your videos (I would appreciate it if you leave a link to the mod page in the description).

❌ You are not allowed to reupload this mod to any other websites/launchers/apps, use any contents of this mod (textures, models, recipes, tags, etc) in other projects, sell this mod in any way or include in paid modpacks - this mod is free for all players.
